title: lastrea rosenstockii
side_effects: Lastrea rosenstockii can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can also cause kidney damage and liver toxicity. In rare cases, improper use of Lastrea rosenstockii may lead to allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Additionally, its improper use may interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure, diabetes, or cardiovascular disease.
